features.name: assert with dynamic array subaccess
features.description: Code should include an assert statement operating on a dynamically indexed array element where the index is a variable signal
features.snippet:
wire _GEN = io_addr ? io_wen_1 : io_wen_0;
always @(posedge clock) begin if (~reset) assert(_GEN); end

features.name: dynamic subaccess generating ternary mux for array
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment that uses a ternary conditional operator to select between array elements based on a dynamic index variable
